# daytona_sandbox_ssh_access (Data Source)

Creates temporary SSH access for a Daytona sandbox.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_sandbox_ssh_access" "example" {
  sandbox_id_or_name = "my-sandbox"
  expires_in_minutes = 30
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `sandbox_id_or_name` (String) Sandbox ID or name.

### Optional

- `expires_in_minutes` (Number) Expiration time in minutes. Daytona defaults to 60 minutes when omitted.
- `organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID to send as `X-Daytona-Organization-ID`.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) SSH access creation timestamp.
- `expires_at` (String) SSH access expiration timestamp.
- `id` (String) SSH access ID.
- `sandbox_id` (String) Sandbox ID.
- `ssh_command` (String, Sensitive) SSH command containing temporary access material.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) Temporary SSH access token.
- `updated_at` (String) SSH access update timestamp.
